name: Abkhaz-Adyge
notes: Abkhaz-Adyge — a classification node, not a language. It groups its descendants and carries no phonology of its own: a clade is a set, not something anyone spoke. Glottolog languoid abkh1242 (family level).

sources.author: Hammarström, Harald et al.
sources.title: Glottolog 5.0
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology

location.notes: Glottolog's computed centroid for the Abkhaz-Adyge family — a summary of a whole clade's range, not a place anyone speaks.
